narrative:
93 Ohio House district has 76,694 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.1 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -11.8% D−R vs -26.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
